_comment: Move-to-rear demo: a single Spearmen regiment is staged alone (drill mode, no opponent) at (500,430) facing SOUTH. It is selected, then given a move order to a destination directly to its REAR (north, 500,250). Because that destination is >135 deg off the unit's facing, the regiment executes an about-face (conversio) -- every soldier reverses 180 deg where they stand, front rank becoming rear rank, the block keeping its footprint -- and only then marches north facing its destination, instead of pivoting the whole block about its centre or sliding backwards. Staged as a lone unit so the in-place pivot is unmistakable on screen; the destination is kept close so the pivot AND the ensuing northward march both land inside the clip. The camera holds a tight frame spanning start and destination. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
